summary: Ukrainian forces are deploying E-300 drones, rebuilt from light aircraft, on the Zaporizhzhia front, while Russian operators of the "Rubikon" Center reported 136 targets eliminated on March 14, 2026, across Donbas, Sumy, and Krasny Liman directions. Ukrainian kamikaze drones struck the Afipsky oil refinery in Krasnodar Krai on March 14, igniting a major fire. Russian forces are using the "Elka" anti-drone system to intercept Ukrainian "Hornet" fixed-wing UAVs, and both sides continue heavy FPV drone strikes on infantry, artillery, and reconnaissance targets, with Ukrainian operators attempting to disrupt Russian positions before attacks. A Russian soldier was killed in a bayonet charge against an FPV drone, and Ukrainian FPV teams are targeting enemy drones and artillery with increasing precision.
